name: Emma
description: A timeless classic carrying the beautiful meaning of wholeness and universality. It was popularized by the beloved character Emma Woodhouse in Jane Austen's famous novel. This name suggests a person who is complete, well-rounded, and has a universal appeal, a bright, shining light that brings everything together.

name: William
description: A classic and enduring name of royal heritage, borne by numerous kings and the famous poet William Shakespeare. It combines the strength of a resolute will with the noble duty of a protector. This name implies a person of steadfast character, a strong and dependable guardian who is both timeless and universally admired.

name: Olivia
description: A name of elegant beauty, believed to have been coined by William Shakespeare for a noble heiress in his play Twelfth Night. The olive tree is a powerful, ancient symbol of peace, fruitfulness, and dignity. Olivia suggests a person of serene strength, a bringer of peace and prosperity, who carries herself with timeless grace and intelligence.

name: Oliver
meaning: Olive tree - Elf army - Ancestor's descendant
description: A name with deep roots in both Latin and Old Norse traditions, symbolizing peace and a connection to noble ancestry. It became popular in medieval times through the heroic character in The Song of Roland. Oliver is a name of quiet strength and peace, suggesting a person who is dignified, fruitful, and a bringer of beauty and calm.

name: Ava
description: A short and strikingly elegant name of multiple origins, carrying meanings of life, a birdlike quality, and a beautiful voice. It has been a modern favorite for decades, admired for its simple, powerful charm. Ava suggests a person of vibrant energy and liveliness, one who is graceful, spirited, and full of life and song.

name: James
meaning: Supplanter - One who grasps the heel
description: A stalwart, classic name of Hebrew origin that has been a pillar in the English-speaking world for centuries. It is the name of two of Jesus's apostles, lending it a profound spiritual weight. James is a name of enduring strength and steadfastness, suggesting a person who is reliable, wise, and a foundational presence.

name: Isabella
meaning: Devoted to God - God is my oath
description: The romantic Spanish and Italian variation of Elizabeth, a name of deep faith and royal elegance. It has been a favorite across the Anglosphere for centuries, beloved for its lyrical sound and powerful meaning. Isabella suggests a person of profound devotion, a noble soul who is both beautifully regal and faithful.

name: Benjamin
meaning: Son of the right hand - Son of my days
description: A beloved biblical name of Hebrew origin, belonging to the youngest and favored son of the patriarch Jacob. It has enjoyed widespread popularity for decades, seen as both traditional and modern. Benjamin is a name of wisdom and favored status, suggesting a person who is beloved, wise, and a cherished leader.

name: Charlotte
description: The elegant feminine form of Charles, a name of French origin that has been a classic in the English-speaking world for centuries. It has been a popular choice for royalty, from queens to modern princesses. Charlotte suggests a person of free spirit and inner strength, one who is elegant, literary, and possesses a strong, independent character.

name: Henry
meaning: Ruler of the home - Estate ruler
description: A strong, classic name of German origin, a staple among English royalty for centuries. It feels both traditional and stylish, conveying a sense of gentle, quiet leadership and responsibility. Henry is a name of dependable strength, suggesting a person who is a natural leader, a trustworthy guardian of the home and family.

name: Mia
meaning: Mine - Bitter - Beloved - Drop of the sea
description: A short, sweet, and internationally beloved name, originating as a Scandinavian diminutive of Maria. It has enjoyed a meteoric rise in popularity, admired for its multicultural appeal and unfussy elegance. Mia is a name of simple charm, suggesting a person who is dearly loved, a 'mine' of happiness, and a soul of gentle, beautiful grace.

name: Alexander
meaning: Defender of mankind - Protector of men
description: A name of immense historic power and prestige, derived from the Greek 'Alexandros', meaning defender of men. It is most famously associated with Alexander the Great, one of history's greatest military commanders. Alexander suggests a person of heroic strength, a mighty protector who is a leader, a defender, and a figure of legendary stature.

name: Amelia
description: A beautifully energetic name, a variant of the German 'Amalia', meaning industrious and hardworking. It has become a modern favorite, admired for its combination of classic roots and a fresh, lively sound. Amelia is a name of spirited strength, suggesting a person who is hardworking, vigorous, and full of fertile energy and determination.

name: Jack
description: A cheerful and friendly name of English origin, originally a diminutive of John. It has become a classic everyman name, associated with durability and a reliable, approachable charm. Jack is a name of joyful simplicity, suggesting a person who is a loyal friend, a joyful soul, and a source of cheerful, dependable energy.

name: Harper
description: Originally a surname for a skilled musician who played the harp, this name has been transformed into a modern, creative first name. It has a strong, artistic feel, suggesting a person of talent and imagination. Harper is a name of artistic spirit, suggesting a person who is creative, musical, and has a unique, talented, and expressive soul.

name: Ethan
description: A name of Hebrew origin that has consistently remained a popular choice for boys. It appears in the Bible as the name of a wise man, lending it a sense of ancient strength and wisdom. Ethan is a name of solid, enduring character, suggesting a person who is strong-willed, reliable, and a firm, steadfast presence.

name: Evelyn
meaning: Desired - Wished for child - Life - Island
description: Originally a surname, Evelyn has become a beautifully vintage and popular name for girls. It has a soft, melodic sound and a romantic feel, suggesting a person who is a deeply wished-for gift. Evelyn is a name of gentle charm, suggesting a person who is a cherished blessing, a breath of fresh air, and a soul of timeless, graceful beauty.

name: Lucas
meaning: Light - Man from Lucania - Bringer of light
description: The Latin form of the Greek name Loukas, meaning a man from Lucania or bringer of light. It is a bright, contemporary name that has risen in popularity, admired for its friendly yet classic sound. Lucas is a name of radiant energy, suggesting a person who is a bringer of light, a shining star, and a source of clarity and warmth.

name: Abigail
description: A classic name of Hebrew origin from the Old Testament, belonging to a wise and beautiful woman who became a wife of King David. It has been a popular and well-loved name for centuries. Abigail is a name of joyful grace, suggesting a person who is a source of happiness and delight, intelligent, kind, and a true, loyal friend.

name: Logan
description: A strong, outdoorsy name of Scottish origin, originally a surname referring to a small, hollow valley. It has a rugged, down-to-earth feel, suggesting a person with a connection to nature and a grounded spirit. Logan is a name of calm strength, suggesting a person who is a protector, a champion, and a soul of quiet, grounded power.

name: Emily
description: A hugely popular name of Latin origin, derived from the Roman family name Aemilius. It has a classic, feminine, and strong appeal, and was the most popular girls' name for over a decade. Emily is a name of graceful strength, suggesting a person who is industrious, eager, and a beautiful, intelligent, and kind soul who shines brightly.

name: Mason
description: Originally an occupational surname for a skilled stone worker, Mason has become a popular and sturdy first name. It has a strong, reliable, and contemporary feel, reflecting a person of solid character. Mason is a name of skilled strength, suggesting a person who is a builder, a craftsman, and a dependable, sturdy, and hardworking soul.

name: Grace
description: A beautiful virtue name from the Latin 'gratia', meaning the divine favor and love of God. It has been a classic choice for centuries, representing elegance, kindness, and a serene spirit. Grace is a name of pure elegance, suggesting a person who is a divine blessing, full of charm, goodness, and a peaceful, graceful presence.

name: Aiden
description: A name of Irish origin, derived from the Celtic sun god Aodh, meaning little fire. It has a vibrant, energetic, and modern feel, becoming a popular choice for its spark and warmth. Aiden is a name of passionate energy, suggesting a person who is a spark of life, full of courage, warmth, and a bright, fiery spirit.

name: Scarlett
description: Originally an occupational surname for a person who sold a rich, bright red cloth, Scarlett has become a vibrant and passionate first name. It is associated with strength, courage, and a fiery spirit. Scarlett is a name of bold energy, suggesting a person who is a passionate leader, full of life, courage, and a bright, determined, and unforgettable spirit.

name: Daniel
description: A classic, strong name of Hebrew origin from the Old Testament, belonging to a prophet known for his wisdom and integrity. It has remained a beloved and popular choice for centuries worldwide. Daniel is a name of wise strength, suggesting a person of sound judgment, a fair and principled leader, and a soul of unwavering faith and wisdom.

name: Chloe
description: A bright, springtime name of Greek origin, meaning a young, green shoot of a plant. It symbolizes new growth, vitality, and a fresh, youthful energy. Chloe is a name of natural beauty, suggesting a person who is full of life, a symbol of spring, and a soul of blooming, elegant, and vibrant charm.

name: Jacob
meaning: Supplanter - He grasps the heel - May God protect
description: A name of profound biblical heritage, borne by the great patriarch of the Israelites. It has been the most popular name for boys in the US for over a decade, admired for its classic strength. Jacob is a name of strong endurance, suggesting a person of determination, a natural leader, and a soul of deep faith and resilience.

name: Ella
description: A short, melodious name of German origin, meaning fairy maiden or all, and also 'goddess' in Hebrew. It is a sweet, simple name that has enjoyed a resurgence in popularity in modern times. Ella is a name of magical grace, suggesting a person of gentle beauty, a bright, shining light, and a soul of elegant, fairy-like charm.

name: Sebastian
description: A name of ancient origin, meaning revered or venerable, and belonging to a 3rd-century Roman martyr and saint. It has a sophisticated, intellectual, and strong feel, a classic yet unconventional choice. Sebastian is a name of dignified strength, suggesting a person of reverence, a protector, and a soul of sophisticated, venerable, and noble character.

name: Sofia
description: The beautiful Greek name for wisdom, a concept of profound intelligence and philosophical depth. It is a name of timeless elegance and intellectual appeal, popular across many cultures and languages. Sofia is a name of brilliant grace, suggesting a person of deep wisdom, an intelligent, kind soul, and a spirit of radiant, knowledgeable beauty.

name: Matthew
description: A classic and beloved name of Hebrew origin, belonging to one of the twelve apostles and the author of the first Gospel. It conveys a sense of being a cherished gift and a blessing. Matthew is a name of grateful strength, suggesting a person who is a true blessing, a wise leader, and a faithful, generous, and kind soul.

name: Avery
description: A name with a mystical and wise origin, derived from the Old English name Alfred, meaning elf-counsel. It has become a popular unisex name in modern times, admired for its magical and strong sound. Avery is a name of mystical wisdom, suggesting a person of otherworldly intelligence, a wise counselor, and a soul of magical, strong, and enchanting charm.

name: Jackson
description: A popular modern name of English origin, originally a patronymic surname meaning son of Jack. It has a friendly, sturdy, and approachable feel, a classic everyman name. Jackson is a name of enduring charm, suggesting a person who is a beloved son, a reliable friend, and a soul of friendly, strong, and dependable character.

name: Riley
description: A spirited and adventurous name of Irish and English origin, meaning valiant or a clearing in the rye. It has a lively, upbeat feel, and is a popular choice for its modern, friendly sound. Riley is a name of brave spirit, suggesting a person who is courageous, a loyal friend, and a soul of joyful, valiant, and energetic charm.

name: Elijah
description: A powerful name of Hebrew origin, belonging to a great prophet who performed miracles and defended the worship of God. It has a strong, classic, and deeply faithful feel. Elijah is a name of unwavering faith, suggesting a person of immense spiritual power, a protector of truth, and a soul of fiery, devoted, and miraculous strength.

name: Lily
description: A delicate and sweet floral name, taken directly from the beautiful, trumpet-shaped flower. The lily has been a symbol of purity and innocence for centuries, a favorite in art and religion. Lily is a name of pure beauty, suggesting a person of gentle grace, a symbol of spring, and a soul of delicate, elegant, and innocent charm.

name: Owen
description: A name of Welsh and Irish origin, meaning young warrior or well-born, a legendary name from Celtic mythology. It has a strong, classic, and noble feel, a beloved choice for its dignified sound. Owen is a name of youthful strength, suggesting a person of noble birth, a brave fighter, and a soul of well-born, courageous, and noble character.

name: Zoey
description: A vibrant and modern spelling of the classic Greek name Zoe, meaning life. It is full of energy and vitality, a beautiful way to celebrate the gift of a new life. Zoey is a name of pure energy, suggesting a person who is the very essence of life, a vibrant, full-of-life spirit, and a soul of joyful, bright, and energetic charm.

name: Grayson
meaning: Son of the steward - Son of the gray-haired one
description: A modern and sophisticated name, originally an English surname meaning son of a steward or a gray-haired man. It has a cool, contemporary feel, a popular choice for its strong sound. Grayson is a name of steady strength, suggesting a person who is a trusted leader, a son of wisdom, and a soul of refined, dependable, and noble character.

name: Hannah
description: A classic name of Hebrew origin from the Old Testament, belonging to the mother of the prophet Samuel. It has a gentle, kind, and devoted sound, a beloved choice for centuries. Hannah is a name of divine grace, suggesting a person who is a blessing of favor, a devoted mother, and a soul of gentle, graceful, and loving charm.

name: Leo
description: A short, fierce, and regal name, derived directly from the Latin word for lion, a symbol of strength and courage. It has been a classic name for centuries, used by saints, popes, and emperors. Leo is a name of royal strength, suggesting a person of immense courage, a natural leader, and a soul of brave, powerful, and majestic character.

name: Nora
description: A short, sweet, and radiant name, often used as a diminutive of Honora or Eleanor. It carries the beautiful meanings of honor and light, suggesting a person of integrity and brightness. Nora is a name of shining grace, suggesting a person of great honor, a bright light in the world, and a soul of honest, radiant, and beautiful charm.

name: Levi
description: A name of Hebrew origin, belonging to the third son of Jacob and the ancestor of the priestly tribe of Levites. It has a strong, traditional, yet trendy feel, a popular choice for its biblical roots. Levi is a name of united strength, suggesting a person who is a faithful companion, a joined spirit, and a soul of harmonious, connected, and loyal character.

name: Eleanor
meaning: Light-hearted - Shining light - The other Aenor
description: A classic and elegant name of Old French origin, borne by powerful queens and noblewomen throughout history. It has a sophisticated and regal feel, a name of great depth and compassion. Eleanor is a name of shining grace, suggesting a person who is a radiant light, a compassionate queen, and a soul of light-hearted, elegant, and noble charm.

name: Dylan
meaning: Son of the sea - Born from the ocean - Great tide
description: A poetic and fluid name of Welsh origin, belonging to a mythological sea god. It has a strong, creative, and artistic feel, popularized by the legendary poet Dylan Thomas. Dylan is a name of flowing strength, suggesting a person who is deep as the ocean, a creative spirit, and a soul of fluid, artistic, and great, tidal character.

name: Stella
description: A luminous and celestial name, derived directly from the Latin word for star. It was first used as a given name by the poet Philip Sidney in the 16th century. Stella is a name of heavenly grace, suggesting a person who is a brilliant star, a celestial light in the sky, and a soul of bright, shining, and magical, stellar charm.

name: Nathan
meaning: He gave - Gift of God - Giver
description: A classic and strong name of Hebrew origin, belonging to a prophet in King David's court. It has a solid, dependable, and generous sound, a beloved choice for its straightforward virtue. Nathan is a name of giving strength, suggesting a person who is a gift of God, a generous soul, and a spirit of faithful, giving, and strong character.

name: Maya
description: A beautiful and spiritual name with multiple origins, meaning illusion in Sanskrit, water in Hebrew, and courage in Maori. It has a flowing, exotic, and intelligent feel. Maya is a name of magical grace, suggesting a person of mystical beauty, a mother of courage, and a soul of illusion, magic, and wise, flowing charm.

name: Caleb
description: A strong name of Hebrew origin from the Old Testament, belonging to a spy who trusted God and showed great courage. It has a loyal, brave, and faithful sound, a popular choice for its solid virtue. Caleb is a name of faithful strength, suggesting a person of wholehearted devotion, a loyal companion, and a soul of brave, faithful, and courageous character.

name: Paisley
description: A unique name of Scottish origin, derived from a town known for its distinctive, intricate, teardrop-shaped patterned fabric. It has an artistic and trendy feel, a popular choice for its creative sound. Paisley is a name of artistic grace, suggesting a person of creative design, a unique pattern, and a soul of artistic, trendy, and beautifully patterned charm.

name: Wyatt
meaning: Brave in war - Strong fighter - Hardy
description: A rough-and-tumble name of Old English origin, meaning brave in war, a tough and rugged choice. It carries strong Wild West associations, suggesting a person of courage and dignity. Wyatt is a name of rugged strength, suggesting a person who is a brave warrior, a strong fighter, and a soul of hardy, courageous, and strong, silent character.

name: Aria
description: A beautiful and musical name of Italian origin, meaning a song or melody, often a solo in an opera. It has a lyrical, ethereal, and noble feel, a popular choice for its artistic elegance. Aria is a name of musical grace, suggesting a person of melodious spirit, a beautiful song, and a soul of airy, noble, and enchanting, lion-hearted charm.

name: Isaac
meaning: He will laugh - Laughter - One who rejoices
description: A joyful name of Hebrew origin, belonging to the beloved son of Abraham and Sarah. It is a name of profound biblical heritage, symbolizing the joy of a promised gift. name: Aurora
description: A mystical and romantic name of Latin origin, belonging to the ancient Roman goddess of the dawn. It is also the name of the beautiful natural light display in the sky, the Northern Lights. Aurora is a name of radiant grace, suggesting a person who is a new dawn, a colorful light in the sky, and a soul of magical, bright, and renewing, glorious charm.

name: Thomas

It has been a consistently popular and reliable name for centuries. name: Hazel

It has a vintage, nature-inspired feel, a popular choice for its simple, grounded charm. Hazel is a name of natural grace, suggesting a person of earthy beauty, a wise tree, and a soul of warm, grounded, and naturally elegant charm.

name: Christopher

Christopher is a name of faithful strength, suggesting a person who is a bearer of light, a protector of faith, and a soul of strong, devoted, and deeply spiritual character.

name: Violet
description: A soft, sweet, and vivacious name of Latin origin, taken from the delicate, beautiful violet flower. It has a classic, floral feel, and is a top choice for its timeless elegance and lovely sound. Violet is a name of blooming grace, suggesting a person of purple beauty, a delicate flower, and a soul of soft, sweet, and vivaciously elegant charm.

name: David
description: A name of deep biblical roots and profound significance, belonging to the greatest king of Israel, a poet and a warrior. It is a name of beloved strength, a favorite for centuries. David is a name of beloved strength, suggesting a person of a beloved heart, a poet warrior, and a soul of faithful, courageous, and deeply beloved, darling character.

name: Penelope

Penelope is a name of weaving grace, suggesting a person of clever patience, a faithful weaver of dreams, and a soul of intelligent, loyal, and elegantly patient charm.

name: Julian

Julian is a name of youthful strength, suggesting a person of eternal youth, a sky father, and a soul of charming, noble, and timelessly youthful, sophisticated character.

name: Luna

It has a magical, ethereal feel, and has seen a huge surge in popularity in recent years. Luna is a name of lunar grace, suggesting a person of moonlit beauty, a goddess of the night, and a soul of mystical, bright, and magically beautiful, celestial charm.

name: Andrew

name: Savannah

name: Jaxon

Jaxon is a name of modern strength, suggesting a person who is a son of grace, a cool, edgy, and modern soul of strong, friendly, and trendy, updated character.

name: Ellie
meaning: Bright shining one - God is my light
description: A warm and friendly name, originally a popular nickname for Eleanor and Ellen. It has become a hugely popular name in its own right, admired for its sweet, bright, and cheerful sound. Ellie is a name of shining grace, suggesting a person of bright light, a warm friend, and a soul of friendly, luminous, and beautifully bright, cheerful charm.

name: Dominic

It is common in the Roman-Catholic community, associated with the saint who founded the Dominican order. Dominic is a name of devout strength, suggesting a person of the Lord, a devoted leader, and a soul of belonging, faithful, and strong, religiously devoted character.

name: Madelyn

It ultimately derives from Mary Magdalene, a significant figure in the New Testament. Madelyn is a name of towering grace, suggesting a person of high strength, a woman of resilience, and a soul of sweet, strong, and elegantly classic, dependable charm.

name: Gabriel
meaning: God is my strength - Hero of God
description: A powerful name of Hebrew origin, belonging to a revered archangel, a messenger of God. It has a strong, angelic, and faithful feel, a popular choice for its divine, heroic meaning. name: Brooklyn

It became popular as a first name, often associated with the famous New York City borough. Brooklyn is a name of city grace, suggesting a person of broken beauty, an urban spirit, and a soul of trendy, strong, and uniquely place-based, modern charm.

name: Adrian

description: A rich and deep name of Latin origin, derived from the Roman family name Hadrianus, associated with the sea and the Roman emperor Hadrian. Adrian is a name of deep strength, suggesting a person of the sea, a dark, rich, and ancient soul of strong, worldly, and timelessly noble, elegant character.

name: Claire

Claire is a name of bright grace, suggesting a person of clear light, a luminous spirit, and a soul of simple, strong, and beautifully bright, famous charm.

name: Connor

name: Austin
description: A dignified and handsome name of English origin, a medieval contracted form of the Latin name Augustine, meaning great. Austin is a name of majestic strength, suggesting a person of great magnitude, a magnificent spirit, and a soul of great, majestic, and handsomely dignified, strong character.

name: Cameron

name: Naomi

name: Aubrey

name: Ian

Ian is a name of gracious strength, suggesting a person of divine favor, a simple soul, and a spirit of gracious, strong, and classically simple, faithful character.

name: Caroline
description: An elegant and strong name, the feminine form of Charles, a perennial classic. It has been a popular choice in the Anglosphere for centuries, admired for its timeless, royal elegance. Caroline is a name of free grace, suggesting a person of strong spirit, an elegant woman, and a soul of classic, free, and beautifully strong, enduring charm.

name: Maxwell
description: A flowing and mighty name of Scottish origin, originally a surname meaning great stream. It has a strong, scholarly, and sophisticated feel, a popular choice for its place-name roots. Maxwell is a name of flowing strength, suggesting a person of great stream, a wise scholar, and a soul of mighty, flowing, and sophisticatedly strong, noble character.

name: Willow
description: A graceful and flexible name of English origin, taken from the slender, beautiful willow tree. It has a natural, airy, and free-spirited feel, a popular choice for its nature-inspired beauty. Willow is a name of graceful strength, suggesting a person of slender grace, a flexible soul, and a spirit of natural, airy, and beautifully free, resilient charm.

name: Bentley
meaning: Bent grass meadow - Meadow with coarse grass
description: An upscale and trendy name of English origin, originally a surname meaning a clearing with bent grass. name: Samantha

name: Ryder

Ryder is a name of riding strength, suggesting a person who is a horseman, a brave messenger, and a soul of adventurous, free, and ruggedly cool, warrior spirit.

name: Genesis
description: A fresh and powerful name of Greek origin, meaning the beginning or origin, and the title of the first book of the Bible. It is a modern, biblical-inspired choice. Genesis is a name of new grace, suggesting a person of fresh start, a powerful origin, and a soul of beginning, powerful, and beautifully new, creation charm.

name: Edward
description: A royal and strong name of Old English origin, meaning wealthy guardian, borne by several kings of England. It has a classic, prosperous, and dependable feel. name: Sophie
description: A smart and chic name, the French form of the Greek Sophia, meaning wisdom. It is a popular and beloved choice, often seen as a symbol of intelligence, knowledge, and sweet charm. Sophie is a name of wise grace, suggesting a person of great wisdom, a smart, chic soul, and a spirit of intelligent, sweet, and beautifully wise, charming character.

name: Jason
description: A classic and traditional name of Greek origin, meaning healer, the leader of the Argonauts in the quest for the Golden Fleece. It has a heroic, strong, and adventurous feel. Jason is a name of healing strength, suggesting a person who is a healer, a brave leader, and a soul of classic, heroic, and adventurously healing, strong character.

name: Hailey
description: A sunny and natural name of English origin, meaning a hay meadow or clearing. It has a gentle, strong, and nature-inspired feel, a timeless favorite for its soft, feminine sound. name: Nolan
description: A victorious and spirited name of Irish origin, derived from the Gaelic word for champion. It has a strong, noble, and courageous feel, a popular surname-name. name: Mackenzie
description: A smart and strong name of Scottish origin, a patronymic surname meaning son of a wise ruler. name: Colton
description: A rugged and western name of English origin, meaning a coal town or dark settlement. It has a modern cowboy feel, a popular choice for its strong, tough sound. name: Jasmine
description: A fragrant and exotic name of Persian origin, taken from the beautifully scented jasmine flower. It has a soft, delicate, and feminine feel, a popular choice for its sweet, floral beauty. name: George
description: A grounded and strong name of Greek origin, meaning farmer or earthworker, a name of royal and saintly heritage. It has a classic, trustworthy, and strong feel, a timeless choice for its simple, solid virtue.
